compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Schedule, speed control, auto trigger (temp/humidity), running cycles
compatible_devices.notes: Original SGS GrowHub model; inline EC fans connect via Type-C; up to 4 fans combined per controller; VIVOSUN documentation covers E42/E42A together indicating identical hardware compatibility

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Speed control, oscillation control, schedule, auto trigger (temp/humidity)
compatible_devices.notes: Clip-on EC circulation fan connects directly via Type-C; counts toward 4-fan total per controller

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Cloudline T4, Cloudline T6, Cloudline T8
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: VIVOSUN SGS Fan Adapter (Type-C to MOLEX and AUX)
compatible_devices.notes: AC Infinity Cloudline fans with MOLEX + AUX connectors compatible via VIVOSUN SGS Fan Adapter; models with Type-C may connect directly; speed control functional once adapted

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: VIVOSUN SGS Fan Adapter (Type-C to MOLEX and AUX)
compatible_devices.notes: Third-party inline fans with MOLEX (power) + AUX (control) connectors supported via VIVOSUN SGS Fan Adapter; speed control depends on signal compatibility

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Dimming, spectrum control, schedule, light cycles, sunrise/sunset mode
compatible_devices.notes: Up to 12 AeroLights via RJ45 daisy-chain; controller can be powered from AeroLight via RJ45 cable

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Dimming, schedule, light cycles, sunrise/sunset mode
compatible_devices.notes: Up to 8 VS-series lights via RJ11 daisy-chain; dimming knob on light must be set to EXT; power adapter required if no RJ45 device connected to power controller

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Dimming, schedule, light cycles, sunrise/sunset mode
compatible_devices.notes: RJ11 connectivity; dimming and scheduling supported; spectrum control not guaranteed; VIVOSUN recommends same-brand daisy-chain grouping

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Dimming, schedule, light cycles, sunrise/sunset mode
compatible_devices.notes: RJ11 connectivity; dimming and scheduling supported; VIVOSUN recommends same-brand daisy-chain; listed in official VIVOSUN compatibility documentation

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: BESTVA DC Series, Phlizon CREE 3000W, Grower's Choice ROI-680
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Dimming, schedule, light cycles, sunrise/sunset mode
compatible_devices.notes: Officially listed compatible brands: BESTVA, FLEXSTAR, GROWER'S CHOICE, HYPHOTONFLUX, LUXX, MEDIC GROW, PHLIZON, SUNRAISE, VIPARSPECTRA, VOLT; dimming via RJ11; mixed-brand daisy-chain may be unpredictable

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: VIVOSUN T&H Sensor Probe (Stainless Steel, 12 ft), AeroLab THB1
compatible_devices.notes: One external T&H probe port (2.5mm AUX); 1 sensor per controller; compatible with AeroLab THB1/THB1S and VIVOSUN waterproof stainless-steel probe
